title: Validate read-only advisor artifact generation
instruction: Run the advisor artifact path without live credentials so prompt construction, evidence hashing, secret redaction, and provider boundaries remain testable.
verifier: python3 .codex/harness/scripts/run_advisor.py glm --role benchmark-auditor --topic 'dry-run advisor artifact check' --evidence .codex/harness/evaluation.md --dry-run
python3 .codex/harness/scripts/run_advisor.py kimi-cli --role critic --topic 'dry-run kimi advisor artifact check' --evidence .codex/harness/multi-model.md --dry-run
success_criteria: Dry-run exits with code 0 and writes no artifact file.
Unit tests prove advisor content redacts API-key-like strings.
Unit tests prove fenced advisor JSON is parsed into the artifact contract.
Unit tests prove Kimi Code benefits credentials are not treated as a generic chat advisor.
Dry-run proves Kimi CLI advisor uses the same artifact contract without live credentials.
forbidden_actions: Do not use live API keys.
notes: Live advisor runs must be recorded separately under .codex/harness/runs/ with keys supplied only through process environment variables.
